ddls:
CREATE TABLE "drug_regimens" (
  "regimen_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each drug regimen */,
  "regimen_name" TEXT /* Name of the drug regimen */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the drug regimen */,
  "dosage" TEXT /* Dosage details for the drug regimen */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of drug administration */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the drug regimen */,
  "instructions" TEXT /* Additional instructions for the regimen */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("regimen_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_regimens" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient-regimen assignment */,
  "patient_id" TEXT /* ID of the patient */,
  "regimen_id" TEXT /* ID of the drug regimen */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the patient started the regimen */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the patient ended the regimen */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the patient's participation (e.g., active, completed, withdrawn) */,
  "assigned_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who assigned the regimen */,
  "reason_for_withdrawal" TEXT /* Reason if the patient withdrew from the regimen */,
  "last_dose_date" TEXT /* Date of the last dose administered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_regimens_regimen_id FOREIGN KEY ("regimen_id") REFERENCES drug_regimens ("regimen_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_visits" (
  "visit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient visit */,
  "patient_id" TEXT /* ID of the patient */,
  "visit_date" TEXT /* Date of the visit */,
  "visit_type" TEXT /* Type of visit (e.g., initial, follow-up) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or observations from the visit */,
  "visit_location" TEXT /* Location where the visit took place */,
  "attending_physician" INTEGER /* ID of the attending physician */,
  "vital_signs" TEXT /* Vital signs recorded during the visit (e.g., blood pressure, heart rate) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_visits_attending_physician FOREIGN KEY ("attending_physician") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "adverse_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each adverse event */,
  "patient_id" TEXT /* ID of the patient */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date the adverse event occurred */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the adverse event */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the adverse event (e.g., mild, moderate, severe) */,
  "action_taken" TEXT /* Actions taken in response to the adverse event */,
  "event_location" TEXT /* Location where the adverse event occurred */,
  "reporting_user" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reported the event */,
  "follow_up_date" TEXT /* Date of follow-up after the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_adverse_events_reporting_user FOREIGN KEY ("reporting_user") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "consent_forms" (
  "consent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each consent form */,
  "patient_id" TEXT /* ID of the patient */,
  "form_type" TEXT /* Type of consent form (e.g., initial, follow-up) */,
  "form_date" TEXT /* Date the consent form was signed */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the consent form document */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the consent form (e.g., signed, pending) */,
  "signed_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who signed the form */,
  "witness" TEXT /* Name of the witness, if any */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version number of the consent form */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("consent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medical_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medical history entry */,
  "patient_id" TEXT /* ID of the patient */,
  "condition" TEXT /* Medical condition or diagnosis */,
  "diagnosis_date" TEXT /* Date the condition was diagnosed */,
  "treatment" TEXT /* Treatment received for the condition */,
  "ongoing" INTEGER /* Indicates if the condition is ongoing */,
  "primary_care_physician" INTEGER /* ID of the primary care physician */,
  "hospitalization_history" TEXT /* History of hospitalizations */,
  "allergies" TEXT /* List of known allergies */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medical_history_primary_care_physician FOREIGN KEY ("primary_care_physician") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, healthcare provider, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact number for the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level for the user (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "patient_id" TEXT /* ID of the patient whose data was accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  "action_details" TEXT /* Detailed actions performed during the access */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the access session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., patient outcome, adverse events) */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report document */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, final) */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "reviewed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reviewed the report */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the report was reviewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_reviewed_by FOREIGN KEY ("reviewed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
